title: NoElytra
description: A plugin that prohibits the use of elytras on your server.
body:
# NoElytra
This plugin prohibits players from equiping an elytra on your Minecraft server. When a player tries to put an elytra in the armor slot it will drop and they will be send an error message.

![Screenshot of the error message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94388d3c5c01b3557b2c5a7d14d93078102593af.png)
